_note: Example palette + grid tokens for creative-architecture-diagram. This is a STARTING POINT, not a mandatory catalogue. Define a per-diagram palette and adapt freely; only the grid constants are meant to be kept.

shapes.card: rounded card with soft shadow; fill=role.fill, stroke=role.stroke, text=role.text
shapes.hub: filled ellipse for a central orchestrator; fill=role.stroke, text=white

rules: Colour means role/band or aesthetic, never DHL lifecycle.
Every coordinate is a multiple of GRID (8).
One accent per band; siblings NODE_GAP apart; bands BAND_GAP apart.
Connectors orthogonal; nothing crosses an unrelated node.
